theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Healthcare requires trust, calm, and clarity. A dark UI feels too clinical or tech-heavy. We use an organic light theme with strong, grounded colors and high-contrast alert colors for emergency features. The design is strictly tailored for less tech-savvy users with huge tap targets and highly accessible text.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green. Conveys stability, trust, and health without falling into the overused 'tech teal'.

accent_emergency.description: Signal Red for Emergency 24x7 Call buttons.

accent_whatsapp.description: Familiar WhatsApp green to instantly signal easy chatting for booking.

fonts.heading: Outfit
fonts.description: Outfit provides a highly legible, friendly, and modern structural feel for headings. DM Sans offers perfect readability for body copy, crucial for older or less tech-savvy patients.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing + Massive Targets. Buttons must be minimum h-14 or h-16. No fine-motor precision required to use the site.

header.style: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-slate-200
header.elements: Logo left. Language toggle (English/Hindi) and Emergency Call button right. Mobile view features a massive 'Call Now' sticky header.

hero.layout: Text heavily focused on the left. Trust badges. The absolute highlight is a 3-button block: [Call Emergency] (Red), [WhatsApp Appointment] (Green), [Get Directions] (Primary).
hero.overlay: If using image background, use bg-white/80 to ensure text is 100% readable without squinting.

quick_actions_bar.button_class: flex-1 h-16 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 text-lg font-bold shadow-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1

facilities_gallery.style: bento grid layout with large cards
facilities_gallery.card_style: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl aspect-square sm:aspect-video
facilities_gallery.text: Bottom aligned, large white text with explicit icon.

forms.rule: BANNED. Do not build any HTML forms. Appointments are exclusively via WhatsApp or Phone Calls.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA. Red and Green buttons must have white text. White cards must have dark slate text.
accessibility_and_testing.interactions: Provide hover and active states (e.g., scale-95 on click) to give tactile feedback.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons and links MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-booking-btn', data-testid='emergency-call-btn').

hero_background.description: Hospital Lobby Reception. Use as a welcoming hero or about section background.

facility_room.description: Hospital bed near couch (Placeholder for Private Rooms / General Ward)

icons.sizing: Use w-8 h-8 or w-10 h-10 for critical action buttons to ensure high visibility.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Create the website strictly using .js and .jsx files (not .tsx).
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Include Lucide React icons. Run: yarn add lucide-react
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Focus heavily on the mobile view. The bottom edge of the screen or header should have fixed call/WhatsApp buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: No Forms! Remove any concept of a 'Submit' button or API endpoint. Direct users to `tel:9565750707` and `https://wa.me/919565750707`.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Map the 8 doctors explicitly in the code using the provided placeholder images. Roles: Dr. Rupesh Goel (Pain & Critical Care), Dr. Vinita Goel (Infertility), Dr. Shrey Singh (Orthopaedic), Dr. Manas Prakash (Neurosurgeon), Dr. P.K. Verma (Neurosurgeon), Dr. Durgesh Tripathi (Surgeon), Dr. Vikas Kumar (Urologist), Dr. Shivendra (Pediatrician).
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Embed the Google Map link prominently (https://maps.app.goo.gl/y8uCi3bR4FfkLTwg6) using an iframe or a huge button.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not center align standard text paragraphs; keep them left-aligned for reading ease.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Inject data-testid on every interactive element.
